title: 5 Tips for Deploying AI Agents to Production
summary: AWS Developers presents five production best practices for deploying AI agents: streaming tool call events for responsiveness, layered authentication via API Gateway and Cognito, type-safe contracted database access with tenant isolation, guardrails and cost budgets through lifecycle hooks and model routing, and observability via metrics and OpenTelemetry tracing. These patterns apply across frameworks and cloud providers.
